request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw a local news report about how our city's emergency response teams are struggling with outdated equipment. They showed footage of a recent drill where the gear literally failed mid-exercise. This isn't just about national defense—it's about whether our own communities can handle emergencies. We need to invest in civil defense preparedness now, before it's too late. #CommunitySafety #PreparednessMatters
